name: Chicken Portabella
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Chicken thighs or breast, skinless and boneless
6 ounces Portobella mushrooms, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Divide chicken into four equal portions. Lightly salt and sear on both sides in an oven-safe pan. Remove from the pan and set aside.
3. Sauté mushrooms lightly for 1-2 minutes. Remove from the pan and set aside.
4. Add shallots and garlic, and sauté for 1 minute. Add green pepper and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
5. Deglaze the pan by adding 1/4 cup red, white, or ros wine (I personally prefer a ros with chicken). Allow to reduce by half.
6. Add chicken stock and herbs. Return chicken to the pan and place in the oven.
7. After 10 minutes, add portabella mushrooms on top. Cook another 5-10 minutes or until done.
8. Remove chicken to serving platter or plates, leaving mushrooms behind. Stir arrowroot dissolved in wine to thicken the sauce. Add salt and pepper to taste.
9. Spoon over chicken and serve.
Suggested side dish: Oven Roasted Herbed Potatoes
